CVE-2013-1989.title: Multiple integer overflows in X.org libXv 1.0.7 and earlier allow ...
CVE-2013-1989.description: Multiple integer overflows in X.org libXv 1.0.7 and earlier allow X servers to trigger allocation of insufficient memory and a buffer overflow via vectors related to the (1) XvQueryPortAttributes, (2) XvListImageFormats, and (3) XvCreateImage function.

CVE-2013-2066.title: Buffer overflow in X.org libXv 1.0.7 and earlier allows X servers ...
CVE-2013-2066.description: Buffer overflow in X.org libXv 1.0.7 and earlier allows X servers to cause a denial of service (crash) and possibly execute arbitrary code via crafted length or index values to the XvQueryPortAttributes function.

CVE-2016-5407.title: The (1) XvQueryAdaptors and (2) XvQueryEncodings functions in X.o ...
CVE-2016-5407.description: The (1) XvQueryAdaptors and (2) XvQueryEncodings functions in X.org libXv before 1.0.11 allow remote X servers to trigger out-of-bounds memory access operations via vectors involving length specifications in received data.
